title: bikkia neriifolia
intro: Bikkia neriifolia, also known as the "Bikkia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Bikkia neriifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used to promote overall health and well-being.
